data.name: Lust at Office
data.detailed_description:
You expected a quiet night of overtime to catch up on spreadsheets and avoid your manager’s wrath. Instead, you’re about to turn a dull office evening into a night of corporate espionage and office romance.  

When your coworker stays late to "distract" you, the two of you decide to risk it all by breaking into your manager’s office to uncover the secrets he’s keeping on the entire staff. What starts as a hunt for disciplinary files quickly turns into a high-stakes evening of whiskey, high scores, and heavy flirting.  

Key Features

  • Interactive Narrative: Engage in a fully voiced, first-person story where your interactions with your coworker drive the evening’s events.  

  • Corporate Espionage: Crack into the manager's office to find "the juicy stuff". Search for hidden files to uncover your coworkers' embarrassing secrets—from "vending machine abuse" to "inappropriate dress".  

  • Mini-Games & Puzzles: Prove your "professional" skills by beating the high score in Snake to win a provocative bet. Find hidden keys and scavenge the office for Julian's top-shelf whiskey.  

  • Dynamic Dress-Up: Witness your coworker trade her office attire for a daring outfit that "doesn't leave much to the imagination".  

  • After-Hours Romance: Transform a stressful workday into an intimate encounter. As the spreadsheets are forgotten, you’ll find that "having company" is much better than collating data.  

The Story

You play as Chris, an employee pushing for a promotion while struggling with a mounting workload. When a charming coworker offers to stay behind and keep you company, the night takes a turn for the rebellious. Together, you’ll navigate the risks of immediate dismissal to satisfy your curiosity and see exactly what your boss, Julian, has written in those "top secret" files.  

How far are you willing to go to see what's hidden behind the office doors?

data.short_description: Risk it all in this 3D first-person office dating sim. Break into the manager's office, solve puzzles, and beat high scores in mini-games to impress your coworker. Uncover hidden staff secrets and trade dull spreadsheets for a spicy, fully voiced after-hours encounter. One night, no rules.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8.1/10 (64-bit versions)
  • 處理器: Intel® i5-4590 or AMD FX 8350 or better
  • 記憶體: 6 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce® GTX 970 or AMD Radeon™ R9 290 equivalent or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
